rationale: The cited paper appears only once in the citing article, in a grouped citation with Miravete (2002), to support an illustrative claim that cellular phone pricing is complex and may not be transparent to consumers. In this context, it functions as background evidence for one example in a conceptual discussion of when the Lucas critique may or may not apply. The citing paper does not build its framework, methods, hypotheses, or empirical analysis on the cited study specifically.
